title: Opening for Software Engineer at Netmeds

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Netmeds
jsonLd.description:
Netmeds invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Netmeds:
Netmeds is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds!
